title: IIFire: Intelligent firefighting system based on IoT & FAHP algorithm
snippet: Design Overview IIFire, or Intelligent IoT Firefighting System, is an integrated system deployed on government servers of Shanghai fire brigade, which detects potential fire hazard and report real-life fire alarms in buildings to save people’s life and money. title: SmarTemp: Temperature Measure & Manage Assistant
